posts.author: proudstudios (proud12432)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Community,

it would be super helpful to set the reminder also XY minutes before the time of a date is reached.

Example
Currently i can only set the reminder at a fixed time at the day of the occurring event.

or

At a fixed time on XY days before.

But not 30 minutes before the event it self.

Bildschirmfoto 2022-06-29 um 18.50.052042×1136 122 KB

Would be great to know if i overlooked something or this feature could be adjusted by the Monday Team.

Greetings!

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @proudstudios,

If you’re open to using apps, you can use Automato to set up this automation:

10 minutes before Meeting start arrives Then notify Person754×219 14.6 KB

You can configure a reminder at any number of seconds/minutes/hours/days/weeks/months before a date arrives.

This automation is also available in the Calendar Plus app.

–
